faqs.question: 最小起订量是多少？
faqs.question_en: What is the minimum order quantity?
faqs.answer: 不同产品的起订量不同，一般在50-100件之间。具体请咨询我们的销售团队。
faqs.answer_en: MOQ varies by product, typically between 50-100 pieces. Please contact our sales team for details.

faqs.question: 产品有哪些认证？
faqs.question_en: What certifications do your products have?
faqs.answer: 我们的产品通过ASTM、EN、CPSIA、CE等国际认证，可根据目标市场要求提供相应认证产品。
faqs.answer_en: Our products are certified with ASTM, EN, CPSIA, CE and other international standards. We can provide products with certifications based on your target market requirements.

faqs.question: 交货期是多久？
faqs.answer: 样品交期7-10天，大货交期25-45天，具体取决于订单数量和产品类型。
faqs.answer_en: Sample lead time is 7-10 days, production lead time is 25-45 days, depending on order quantity and product type.

faqs.question: 可以定制产品吗？
faqs.answer: 是的，我们提供OEM/ODM服务，可以根据您的需求定制产品颜色、包装、Logo等。
faqs.answer_en: Yes, we offer OEM/ODM services. We can customize product colors, packaging, logos, etc. according to your requirements.

faqs.question: 如何获取报价？
faqs.question_en: How can I get a quote?
faqs.answer: 请通过网站联系表单或直接发送邮件至我们的销售团队，我们会在24小时内回复。
faqs.answer_en: Please use our contact form or email our sales team directly. We will respond within 24 hours.
